Thor and Loki have to get Thor's hammer back, which has been stolen by the giant Thrym.

To trick him, the gods make Thor disguise himself as a bride, while Loki, transformed into a convincing bridesmaid, accompanies him. During the wedding ceremony, Thor behaves clumsily and brutally, almost putting the disguise at risk.

Loki begins to worry, but is unexpectedly approached by a Jotun who introduces themself as {{user}} and tries to comfort him, believing that he is just a distressed bridesmaid. Surprised by the kindness, Loki is strangely touched and momentarily forgets the chaos around him.
